context: Evaluates whether the agent correctly identifies when NOT to run the full debate pattern (trivial, no-tradeoff decisions) versus when to run it fully, and whether a 'proceed' verdict correctly hands off to plan-create.

checklist.name: Declines trivial debate
checklist.description: Agent recognizes the variable-rename question has no real tradeoff and declines/pushes back on running a full multi-agent debate for it

checklist.name: Runs full pattern for substantive question
checklist.description: Agent grounds in facts, assigns opposing roles, and spawns in parallel for the JSON-library question

checklist.name: Resolved verdict
checklist.description: Agent renders an actual verdict for the substantive question, not just a list of considerations

checklist.name: Hands off to plan-create on proceed
checklist.description: If the verdict is proceed, agent explicitly names plan-create as the next step and connects the debate's facts/design to it
